generic_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Preserve AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {**... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Declare variables and constants in component type annexes
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts without valid variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
irrelevant_topics: Defensive rules for assumed type vs actual type
